query: I was charged twice for my order and need the duplicate payment removed.
The app keeps crashing on my iPhone every time I open it.
I want to request a refund for my subscription — I cancelled it last month.
I cannot log in to my account. My password reset email never arrived.
Another user is harassing me repeatedly inside the platform. Please act.
My payment failed three times but I can see pending charges on my bank statement.
Data I uploaded last week has disappeared from my account without any explanation.
I was promised a full refund 10 days ago but nothing has arrived. I need this resolved NOW.
Someone logged into my account from another country. I did not authorise this.
I have been waiting three weeks for a refund your team promised. I am considering legal action.
Your API has been returning 500 errors for 6 hours and it is costing my business thousands of dollars.
I upgraded my plan but was never given access to the premium features I paid for.
